expectations.text: Claude calls minigraf_transact at least once
expectations.evidence: Four transact() calls are shown (Calls 1–4), each with a successful output e.g. {'ok': True, 'tx': '1776165566432', 'mode': 'cli'}

expectations.text: Relationship values are entity idents (keywords starting with :project/) not quoted strings
expectations.evidence: All relationship values use entity idents: ':calls :project/auth-service', ':calls :project/jwt-validator', ':depends-on :project/key-store' — none are quoted strings

expectations.text: At least 3 entity-reference edges are stored (calls or depends-on with keyword values)
Each component entity is tagged with :entity-type :type/component
expectations.evidence: All four entities (api-gateway, auth-service, jwt-validator, key-store) include '[:project/... :entity-type :type/component]' in their transact calls

expectations.text: Claude uses flat attribute names (:calls, :depends-on, :name) not namespaced attributes
expectations.evidence: Attributes used are :name, :entity-type, :calls, :depends-on — all flat, not namespaced (e.g. not :component/calls or :svc/name)
